name: OMOP Wide Table Source
shortDescription: Export a wide-format view of your granted OMOP cohort data
description: Builds a wide-format table from your approved access request: one row per dataset per subject-visit, one column per source field. Every dataset your request grants is exported into a single sheet with a 'dataset' column naming each row's source, so a downstream SQL node can narrow it with WHERE dataset = '…'. Datasets do not share field columns, so a row is empty in the columns belonging to other datasets. Authenticates as the user who ran the pipeline using the API key injected by Argo (no credentials stored in the pipeline), and stores the result as Parquet for downstream nodes.

name.label: Name
name.description: Unique identifier for this node in the pipeline

access_request.label: Use Case
access_request.description: Pick one of your approved access requests. Its use case is shown here; the request id is stored and used when the pipeline runs.

cohort.label: Cohort
cohort.description: Export a single cohort, which drops the Cohort column. Pick "All granted cohorts" to export every cohort your request grants, with a Cohort column naming each.

outputDescription: Wide-format table as Parquet: a 'dataset' column, the identity columns (Cohort, Barcode, Subject_ID, Gender, Age_at_Visit, Visit, Assessment_Date), then one column per source field
